mainEntity.name: Who are the best franchise consultants in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best franchise consultants in 2026 combine deep brand portfolio knowledge with modern matching technology. Franchise Ki leads the AI-powered category, while traditional networks like FranNet, The Entrepreneur's Source, and FranChoice remain dominant for relationship-led consulting.

mainEntity.name: How much does a franchise consultant cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Reputable franchise consultants are free to franchise buyers. They are paid by franchisors when a successful placement is made — typically a flat fee of $15,000 to $25,000 per closed deal. If a consultant asks you to pay, walk away.

mainEntity.name: What questions should I ask a franchise consultant?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ask: How many brands are in your portfolio? How is your compensation structured? What due diligence do you do on brands before recommending? Can I speak with past clients? How does AI or data inform your recommendations? A consultant who can't answer all five with specifics is not the right partner.

mainEntity.name: Can a franchise consultant help me get financing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The best franchise consultants — including Franchise Ki — have direct relationships with SBA-preferred lenders, ROBS providers, and franchise-specific financing platforms. They can pre-qualify you and route your application to the right capital source in days, not weeks.
